title: Hoplite Recipes
description: A data-pack that adds Hoplite's custom recipes and other miscellaneous items
body:
# An add-on for vred's Hoplite Weapons.
This add-on adds a lot of recipes from the server "Hoplite", but also some custom items, like Smelter's Pickaxe or Light Netherite Sword!

<summary>Recipes for vanilla items</summary>
